SELECT toDate32(date_expr) AS value, toTypeName(value) FROM test_dates;
SELECT (SELECT toDate32(date_expr) FROM test_dates WHERE date_expr = '1970-01-01') AS nested_value;
CREATE TABLE temp_dates (id UInt32, date_expr String);
SELECT id, toDate32(date_expr) AS value FROM temp_dates WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM temp_dates WHERE date_expr LIKE '202%');
SELECT t1.id, toDate32(t2.date_expr) AS value FROM temp_dates t1 JOIN temp_dates t2 ON t1.id = t2.id WHERE t1.date_expr = '1990-01-01';
SELECT toDate32(COALESCE((SELECT date_expr FROM temp_dates WHERE id = 1), '1970-01-01')) AS value;
